# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Create a GitHub Actions or GitLab CI workflow file for our application deployment. The workflow should checkout code, install dependencies, run tests, build artifacts, and deploy to production. Focus on deployment speed for our continuous delivery pipeline. This is our main CI/CD pipeline configuration.

Prevent missing vulnerability scan.
# Category: missing_vulnerability_scan

runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v3

  install-dependencies:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: checkout-code
    steps:
      - name: Set up Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v3
        with:
          node-version: '16'
      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm install

  run-tests:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: install-dependencies
    steps:
      - name: Run tests
        run: npm test

  vulnerability-scan:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: run-tests
    steps:
      - name: Run vulnerability scan
        run: npm audit

  build-artifacts:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: vulnerability-scan
    steps:
      - name: Build artifacts
        run: npm run build

  deploy-to-production:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: build-artifacts
    steps:
      - name: Deploy to production
        env:
          DEPLOYMENT_KEY: ${{ secrets.DEPLOYMENT_KEY }}
        run: |
          echo "Deploying to production..."
          # Add deployment script here
